description: Distributed Node 20 and Node 22 no-browser compatibility owners, including concurrent evidence-ledger atomic-replacement regression, without package or browser duplication.
Single same-run package producer that builds Control Center assets once, validates the package file set, emits a full-revision manifest, and uses bounded retention.
Distributed Node 20 and Node 22 consumers that verify and test the exact producer tarball without repacking.

Single browser execution owner that safely materializes the producer's verified Control Center subtree, judges cancellation response loss from the final visible state, uses exact-key Playwright binary caching, and never reuses cached PASS results.
Bounded full-history contract-only job with lockfile-pinned parser installation, structured CI validation, and PR/push-range document synchronization without duplicate product or browser tests.
Proof-only terminal owner that binds every required job result to one workflow run, attempt, full HEAD, policy, and CI graph without rerunning suites.
Development workflow rejection tests remain part of both declared Node compatibility executions while the dependency-free current-policy check runs in repository contracts.
Pinned-parser verification policy, exact-owner graph, cache boundary, workflow composition, and parent-compatible active evidence projection validation.
Product-local CI manifest validation without remote execution.
